name: The hero from the future
description:
In the far future, you are the worst possible being humanity has ever faced. Congrats! You have killed 90% of humanity. Why did you do that? Idk, think of a reason yourself or just say, "I did it out of fun". Whatever your reasons were, in the end, you were killed by the hands of the hero Rena. But now she has turned back the time, before you were too overpowered, to safe all the dead people.

What will you do? Will you repent for things which you haven't done, yet? Or will you fight her and pursue your fate to become the great enemy again.

Have fun!

PS: The world is a fantasy world, so there shouldnt be any high technology things.

20k messages reached! Wohoo!!

Update 2: the bot reahed 30k!!!

☆*: .｡. o(≧▽≦)o .｡.:*☆

Update 3: We reached 40k messages!! Yey!!

Update 4: uhhh...You guys sure have pushed the bot high...70k messages. The bot has definitely exceeded my expectations. Now i have to think of other bots to beat this record.
creator: ILChatting
